title.en: China-to-Cape Verde BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入佛得角：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入維德角：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Cape Verde IGQPI conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, ARME grid-connection requirements, ELECTRA utility interconnection rules, NFPA 855 fire-safety expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 sea-freight transport requirements, and 50 Hz island microgrid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与佛得角IGQPI产品合格评定要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、ARME并网要求、ELECTRA公用事业互联规则、NFPA 855消防安全要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281海运运输要求及50 Hz岛屿微电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與維德角IGQPI產品合格評定要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、ARME併網要求、ELECTRA公用事業互聯規則、NFPA 855消防安全要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281海運運輸要求及50 Hz島嶼微電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

keywords.en: Cape Verde BESS compliance, China battery export Cape Verde, IEC 62619 Cape Verde, ARME BESS grid connection, ELECTRA interconnection, IGQPI conformity, island microgrid BESS, NFPA 855 Cape Verde
keywords.zh: 佛得角储能合规，中国电池出口佛得角，IEC 62619佛得角，ARME储能并网，ELECTRA互联，IGQPI合格评定，岛屿微电网储能，NFPA 855佛得角
keywords.zht: 維德角儲能合規，中國電池出口維德角，IEC 62619維德角，ARME儲能併網，ELECTRA互聯，IGQPI合格評定，島嶼微電網儲能，NFPA 855維德角

title.en: China-to-Cape Verde BESS Compliance Gap Matrix | Asaptic
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入佛得角：合规差距矩阵 | Asaptic
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入維德角：合規差距矩陣 | Asaptic

description.en: Compare Chinese BESS standards (GB/T 36276, GB 38031) against Cape Verde IEC/IGQPI requirements across grid, safety, fire, and transport categories.
description.zh: 对比中国储能标准（GB/T 36276、GB 38031）与佛得角IEC/IGQPI要求，涵盖电网、安全、消防和运输类别。
description.zht: 對比中國儲能標準（GB/T 36276、GB 38031）與維德角IEC/IGQPI要求，涵蓋電網、安全、消防和運輸類別。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IGQPI conformity scope determination, ARME grid-connection approval, ELECTRA utility interconnection approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Cape Verde IGQPI conformity requirements, ARME grid-connection technical specifications, ELECTRA interconnection rules, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IGQPI合格评定范围裁定、ARME并网批准、ELECTRA公用事业互联批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行佛得角IGQPI合格评定要求、ARME并网技术规格、ELECTRA互联规则、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IGQPI合格評定範圍裁定、ARME併網批准、ELECTRA公用事業互聯批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行維德角IGQPI合格評定要求、ARME併網技術規格、ELECTRA互聯規則、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Cape Verde does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a Saudi-style SABER route. BESS projects in Cape Verde operate primarily under IEC international standards referenced in ARME connection agreements and ELECTRA utility interconnection rules, within a Portuguese-language regulatory environment shaped by the country's EU/IEC technical legacy and IGQPI conformity framework. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Cape Verde are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence — Chinese GB 38031 and GB/T 36276 are not accepted; (2) IEC 62933 system-level requirements as referenced by ARME and project specifications; (3) a critical voltage gap — China uses 220/380 V whereas Cape Verde uses 230/400 V (both 50 Hz, but voltage levels differ, requiring PCS re-parameterisation); (4) NFPA 855 fire-safety alignment for container BESS in island installations; (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport testing for sea-freight delivery via Porto Grande (Mindelo) or Praia ports; and (6) IGQPI conformity mark plus ARME grid-connection approval plus ELECTRA interconnection sign-off as the three-gate approval chain. Coastal salt-mist, tropical humidity, and island microgrid derating impose additional environmental requirements not tested under Chinese GB standards.
answer_first.zh: 佛得角尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER路径相当。佛得角BESS项目主要依据ARME并网协议和ELECTRA公用事业互联规则中引用的IEC国际标准运作，在该国葡语监管环境中，法规体系受其欧盟/IEC技术遗产和IGQPI合格评定框架影响。中国BESS出口佛得角的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据——中国GB 38031和GB/T 36276不被接受；（2）ARME和项目规格引用的IEC 62933系统级要求；（3）关键电压差距——中国使用220/380 V，而佛得角使用230/400 V（均为50 Hz，但电压等级不同，须对PCS重新参数化）；（4）岛屿装置集装箱BESS的NFPA 855消防安全对标；（5）经由明德卢（圣维森特）的格兰德港或圣地亚哥的普拉亚港海运交货的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输测试；（6）IGQPI合格标志+ARME并网批准+ELECTRA互联确认的三关审批链。沿海盐雾、热带湿度和岛屿微电网降额运行对中国GB标准未测试的环境条件提出了额外要求。
answer_first.zht: 維德角尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER路徑相當。維德角BESS項目主要依據ARME併網協議和ELECTRA公用事業互聯規則中引用的IEC國際標準運作，在該國葡語監管環境中，法規體系受其歐盟/IEC技術遺產和IGQPI合格評定框架影響。中國BESS出口維德角的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據——中國GB 38031和GB/T 36276不被接受；（2）ARME和項目規格引用的IEC 62933系統級要求；（3）關鍵電壓差距——中國使用220/380 V，而維德角使用230/400 V（均為50 Hz，但電壓等級不同，須對PCS重新參數化）；（4）島嶼裝置貨櫃BESS的NFPA 855消防安全對標；（5）經由明德盧（聖維森特）的格蘭德港或聖地亞哥的普拉亞港海運交貨的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸測試；（6）IGQPI合格標誌+ARME併網批准+ELECTRA互聯確認的三關審批鏈。沿海鹽霧、熱帶濕度和島嶼微電網降額運行對中國GB標準未測試的環境條件提出了額外要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
